name: Chicken Kabobs
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut garlic.
2. Remove bones and skin from chicken and cut into 1 1/2 inch cubes; place in a large bowl. Add Paprika and stir to coat.
3. Combine white wine, Vegetable oil, rosemary, and garlic; pour over chicken.
4. Marinate at room temperature for 1 hour.
5. About 30 minutes before serving, bring broth to a boil in a medium saucepan. Stir in rice. Cover tightly and simmer for 20 minutes. Remove from heat and let stand tightly covered until all liquid is absorbed (about 5 minutes). Stir in green onions.
6. Meanwhile, thread chicken and squashes onto skewers. Brush with marinade.
7. Cook over high heat or on a charcoal grill for 8 to 10 minutes, turning once and basting with the marinade during cooking.
8. Arrange kabobs over rice to serve.
